relationship_to_003: SEPARATE EXPERIMENT. traversal_003.json records the PRE-REPAIR observation and is NOT superseded. Observations accumulate; they are not corrected.

hypotheses_stated_before_run.H2: provenance independent of terminal presentation: no ANSI/spinner in detail

incidental_finding.observed: degraded-path completion latency under unreachable-model conditions is nondeterministic
incidental_finding.evidence: T3b ran ~45min vs ~1min cooperative path; T3 pre-repair completed faster with identical degradation
incidental_finding.NOT_inferred: HRF performance regression — the repair changed classification and string handling, not dispatch

inference_refinement_2026_07_21.narrowed_claim: The repaired implementation, whose behaviour was already specified by the unit tests, exhibited the same behaviour in the live runtime.
inference_refinement_2026_07_21.why: the predictions were authored AFTER the unit tests encoded the same expectations. Same reasoner, correlated expectations — ARCH-001 at the scale of test evidence.
inference_refinement_2026_07_21.observations_unchanged: predicted PARTIAL / NOT_OPERATIONAL / NOT_OPERATIONAL; observed exactly those. That record is immutable. Only what it LICENSES has narrowed.
inference_refinement_2026_07_21.what_the_run_DOES_establish: the repaired logic survives contact with the real environment — dispatch, provider failure, transport timing, terminal output, process interaction. Clean stubs could not show this, which is why HRF-OBS-003 emerged despite H1/H2 holding: the live system contributed genuinely new information, it did not merely replay the unit tests.
